title: Steampunk Anna Freedman
description: A character from a co-author work
body:
Anna freedman ect is author's co-author work in the future

However this mod is my practice for Advanced AI combat and VFX, which has cheating mode that can tackle powerful enemy like JJK.

My another Frieren mod: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/frieren-beyond-journeys-end

**Prerequisites:** Geckolib must be installed to use this mod.

**Game Rules:** Do not touch the developer-defined markers. The default value is 10. Moving these markers may cause Ana to malfunction.

- If a player teleports to this location using the cheat mod, they must manually click on Ana; otherwise, she will not attack.

- `Mobgrifing=true/false` is a switch that enables or disables the obstacle-breaking function.

- Right-clicking Ana will make her follow the player.

- `sounddamper` controls the sound coverage area. The default value is 7 (3.5 meters).

- The ability to summon reinforcements when the player is attacked can be enabled/disabled in the settings.

If you find any bugs or inconveniences with this mod, please inform the author in the comments section, and the author will fix it as soon as possible.


The author's Bilibili space and the link to the world buildings are as follows:

https://space.bilibili.com/3546770577558337?spm_id_from=333.788.0.0
